sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43963" key="eu)qerapeusi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐθερᾰπ-ευσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n43963.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ease of treatment</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:22:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.22.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
